name: Deck of Darkness: Infernal Depths
short_description: Deck of Darkness: Infernal Depths is an atmospheric dark fantasy dungeon crawl sure to get the blood flowing. Battle your way through the many levels of the lightless abyss to come face to face with your terrifying destiny.
detailed_description:
The flickering torchlight and cold steel in your hand are your only defenses against the total, devouring darkness that surrounds you. Imagine a first person, 3D Diablo without the burden of inventory management and this is what you get!

You are an artifact hunter, a seeker and purveyor of rare, magical relics. Your profession takes you into some of the darkest and most dangerous recesses of existence. The ultimate goal of your search is the fabled Deck of Darkness, an incredibly potent arcane artifact said to grant it's bearer immortality… for a price. Survive long enough and you will face your terrifying destiny in the dungeon's darkest depths.

Deck of Darkness: Infernal Depths is an atmospheric, retro, dark fantasy, horror dungeon crawler. Being a roguelike dungeon crawler, every playthrough will be unique. Each level has it's own theme and monsters, which become more fearsome as you go deeper. Make it to the lowest level of the dungeon and face your terrifying destiny.

Most dungeon crawlers are brightly lit cakewalks compared to this one. Luckily, the powers of the Deck will make you a formidable foe indeed.
